The '''WED-15-1016''' droid, also known as the '''WED-1016 'Techie' droid''', was created by [[Cybot Galactica/Legends|Cybot Galactica]] as a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] [[Maintenance droid/Legends|maintenance droid]]. It had the ability to repair over 5,000 different onboard systems. One droid of this model was used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] on [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]].
